name: carbon-footprint-assistant
description: Professional-grade Carbon Footprint Assistant — Track, analyze, and reduce your climate impact.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w server && npm run test:coverage -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
